# 1.0.1
## Added
- Added exit radiation zone bar animation for the mod version. -
- Added the visual flags of radiation zone in the mod version. -
## Changed
- Deleted legacy code from Craftserve versions of the plugin.
- Changed compatibility level of plugin, it is now supported by Spigot and Bukkit.
- Merged neoforge and fabric version with common module without Architectury API requirement.
- Gradle no longer build `-sources` jar file.
## Fixed
- Fixed exit radiation zone bar animation that stops too early on the plugin version. -
- Fixed radiation bar color on the mod version. -
- Fixed unnecessary radiation effects after death. -
